title: Energy trend explanation
query_text: Why did cluster energy use increase during this interval?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Cluster energy rose ~38% (320→442 kWh) between 06:00–10:00 UTC due to three large jobs (892001, 892002, 892003) starting 07:00–08:00, adding 128 CPUs and 4 GPUs. Cooling load increased 40% to maintain thermal envelope.
